messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud Functions → OCI Functions

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud Functions | OCI Functions |
| 2nd Gen | Same |
| Triggers | Triggers |

### OCI Functions

- Fn Project runtime
- Python, Node, Go, Java
- Event-driven

### Diferencas

- OCI Functions usa Fn Project
- Less triggers que GCP
- Container-based (Fn)

### Deploy

```bash
# Create application
fn create app myapp

# Deploy function
fn deploy --app myapp --local-fn myfunc
```

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_functions_application" "app" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "myapp"
  subnet_ids    = [oci_core_subnet.functions.id]
}
```
